title: helianthus × alexidis
intro: Helianthus × alexidis, also known as the hybrid sunflower, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the cross between Helianthus annuus and Helianthus debilis. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Helianthus × alexidis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from allergies. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
